nodes.label: Memory and Second Brain for Agents
nodes.rationale: Provide agents with dynamic long-term memory and static knowledge through a lightweight, standards-based centralized service.
nodes.norm_label: memory and second brain for agents

nodes.label: API-First Architecture
nodes.rationale: Centralizing RAG, vector database, and memory logic in api_server.py keeps agent clients lightweight, improves extensibility, and minimizes client resource use.

nodes.label: User-Scoped Shared Memory
nodes.rationale: MEM0_USER_ID is the sole memory partition key: agents with the same value share memory, while different values remain isolated.

nodes.label: Local-First Model Routing
nodes.rationale: The default routing strategy prioritizes local models before remote alternatives.
